text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mainichi Hai, Matikanefukukitaru's "Dragon
Gate" and our spring hurdle to the Classics, is
upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to soar through the race like a carp
swimming up a waterfall and show everyone her
transformation into a fearsome classic-year racer,
Matikanefukukitaru heads to the track.
